scripts.dev: npm run build -w @mln122/shared && concurrently -n SERVER,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @mln122/server" "npm run dev -w @mln122/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mln122/shared && npm run build -w @mln122/web && npm run build -w @mln122/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mln122/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mln122/server && npm run typecheck -w @mln122/web
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm run test:smoke -w @mln122/server
